\tzpentry{ID4897}{Magnetic Field Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4897 introduces Magnetic Field Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[\mathbf{B} = \mu_0 \mu_r (\mathbf{H} + \mathbf{M}) \implies \frac{d\omega}{dt} = -\gamma(\omega - \omega_0) - K \sin(2(\theta - \theta_0))\]
